channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘It’s a life-changing sum’: Can I stop my kids from using their inheritance to support political causes I vehemently oppose?
item.description: ”I would hate for our money to end up in the hands of organizations that oppose everything we have supported throughout our lives.”

item.title: ‘I have a moral and ethical conundrum’: My husband was killed by a careless driver. I received $2 million. What do I owe my stepdaughter?
item.description: “As the children grew, life became more complicated.”

item.title: ‘Am I crazy?’ My boyfriend’s parents say he shouldn’t marry me until he earns $50K a year. Who is to blame here?
item.description: “Am I crazy, or are these ‘real’ concerns from his parents?”

item.title: ‘I’m close to retiring’: I’m behind on my property tax. Is this a really bad time to sell my house?
item.description: “I’ve never been late on a mortgage, so this makes me nervous.”

item.title: Palantir joins the wave of businesses and billionaires moving to Florida
item.description: Some experts say Florida’s more business-friendly policies are helping the state attract more corporations.

item.title: Melius upgrades Chevron, sees upside from Venezuela and exploration push
item.description: Melius' updated price forecast implies that shares of Chevron could add 13% from here.

item.title: Leon Cooperman's Omega builds stake in this mortgage lender
item.description: Cooperman bought more than $375 million worth of shares in the Detroit-based mortgage provider during the fourth quarter of last year.

item.title: We may be on the cusp of a new industrial cycle, says Bank of America. How to play it — and score attractive yields
item.description: Bank of America sees opportunity for income as industrial growth takes off.

item.title: Value investor Seth Klarman added Amazon last quarter. Here's what else he bought
item.description: The Boston-based hedge fund manager took a new position in the hyperscaler amounting to $489.7 million.

item.title: Goldman says these software stocks have 'moats' that can thwart AI disruption
item.description: The firm called out a slew of buy-rated software stocks, including Snowflake and MongoDB, as the sector slides.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...

item.title: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) Soars on Promising Inflammation Drug Data
item.description: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) stock surges over 42% on positive Phase 1 data for MRT-8102, showing profound reductions in inflammation marker hsCRP. ...
